edges.quote: No man would ever yield to a creature such as Reek, no matter how desperate his situation. He must pretend to be a prince again.
edges.note: Ramsay deploys the broken Theon (now Reek) as the false-prince negotiator; the breaking is what makes him the obedient instrument that talks the garrison into surrender.

edges.quote: He put a hand on her breast, and squeezed.
edges.note: Marillion's drunken attempted sexual assault on Sansa at the Fingers (attempted; stopped by Lothor Brune).

edges.quote: I'll do worse, if you don't go.
edges.note: Lothor Brune, posted by Littlefinger, drives Marillion off at knifepoint — single-moment extraction from danger.

edges.quote: Ice, I see, and daggers in the dark. Blood frozen red and hard, and naked steel. It was very cold.
edges.note: Melisandre's vision (covers q607 daggers-in-the-dark + q608 skulls/Jon-Snow) directly foreshadows the Castle Black assassination. Canonical Chekhov's gun; target event node exists.
